Hi,

I also noticed your site's footer widget is indexed as its own separate page, sitting in results next to your real Contact and Shop pages.

I put together a page showing what I'd fix: https://organic-theory.vercel.app/leads/funnels/2026-07-22-sheiks-bakery-roti-cafe.html
